overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The player navigates through industrial highway underpasses, past glowing neon barriers, and into dense commercial districts with vibrant holographic advertisements and colorful overhead light structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway underpass with concrete support pillars

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through covered highway underpass following a yellow delivery van

notable_agents.action: yellow delivery van driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support beams spanning across the road
boxy commercial van with illuminated brake lights driving ahead
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the overhead highway structure
tall industrial lighting fixtures illuminating the underpass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark industrial highway underpass with massive concrete pillars lining the sides. The player follows a yellow delivery van through the sheltered roadway, passing under the elevated highway structure while industrial buildings are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway ramps

events.description: exiting covered underpass into open street with elevated highway ramps visible on sides
accelerating while navigating through city streets and passing under highway structures

agents.ego_description: accelerating through city streets passing under elevated highway structures and ramps

entered.detail: curved concrete ramp connecting to the main highway structure
multi-story urban structures with illuminated windows and signage
large electronic advertising screens displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle exits the covered underpass into a more open urban street with elevated highway ramps curving overhead. Commercial buildings with digital billboards appear on the right while the player accelerates through the multi-lane road, having overtaken the yellow van.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street alongside neon-lit metro barrier wall

events.description: long retaining wall with continuous green neon lights appears on right side
passing oncoming vehicles in opposite lanes of the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: cruising alongside a long barrier wall illuminated with green neon lights, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights visible traveling in the opposite direction

entered.detail: long concrete retaining wall topped with continuous green neon lighting
metal walkway structure spanning across the street above the road

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a distinctive stretch of road featuring a long barrier wall on the right illuminated with continuous green neon lights. The player cruises alongside this wall while passing under an overhead pedestrian bridge, with industrial structures visible on the left and occasional oncoming traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: entering dense commercial district with large digital advertisements and towering skyscrapers
turning right at major intersection while navigating through crosswalks

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy commercial intersection surrounded by towering neon billboards and turning right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk near the intersection corner

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screens displaying holographic content on building facades
floating 3D promotional displays projecting above the street level
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
overhead structures with vibrant purple and blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a vibrant commercial district dominated by massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements covering the skyscrapers. The player navigates through a wide intersection with crosswalks, turning right while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks and colorful neon arches become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with overhead neon light arches

events.description: entering street covered by colorful neon arch structures overhead

agents.ego_description: riding under colorful neon arches through commercial street with storefronts on sides

entered.detail: overhead curved structures with vibrant multicolored neon lights forming a tunnel effect
ground-level shop windows with illuminated signage and merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the motorcycle driving through a street covered by vibrant colorful neon arches that create a tunnel-like effect overhead. Storefronts with illuminated displays line the sides of the road as the player continues through this densely commercial area with multicolored lighting reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a motorcycle travels from a dim industrial underpass into a vibrant, open urban corridor. It begins within a dark highway tunnel, gliding past massive concrete pillars while trailing a yellow delivery van beneath the heavy shadow of an elevated roadway. As the motorcycle accelerates, the sheltered environment gives way to a brighter city street where the oppressive concrete ceiling opens up into a network of curving highway ramps. The scene then expands to reveal a multi-lane road lined with commercial buildings and glowing digital billboards on the right. Finally, the camera surges forward, overtaking the van and moving deeper into the neon-lit commercial district.

The shot follows a continuous ride from a sterile industrial corridor into the heart of a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by cruising alongside a long barrier wall illuminated by continuous green neon lights, passing under a pedestrian bridge with industrial structures lining the left. As the motorcycle leaves the industrial zone, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements that tower over the skyscrapers. The camera then turns right through the intersection, moving past pedestrians on the sidewalks toward a series of colorful neon arches. Finally, the environment shifts into a tunnel-like canopy of these vibrant arches, with multicolored lighting reflecting off the wet pavement and illuminated storefronts lining the road.
